requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substance Restriction — No EU-Style Horizontal RoHS in Senegal
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质限制——塞内加尔无欧盟式横向 RoHS
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質限制——塞內加爾無歐盟式橫向 RoHS

summary.en: Stated plainly: as of this review, Senegal does not operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime restricting a fixed list of hazardous substances （lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, and the four phthalates） in homogeneous materials of electrical and electronic equipment as a market-access condition. There is no Senegalese equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU （RoHS 2） as amended by （EU） 2015/863 identified for LED luminaires. Hazardous-substance control in Senegal is addressed, to the extent it applies, through general chemical/environmental and consumer-protection rules and any applicable hazardous-goods import controls, not through a product-level substance-restriction directive with a 0.1%/0.01% maximum-concentration scheme. Manufacturers should not assume EU RoHS substance testing is a Senegalese legal requirement; however, many buyers and the in-country importer may still contractually request RoHS-type declarations. Confirm any applicable substance or chemical-import controls with ASN, the Ministry of Trade, and the importer.
summary.zh: 明确而言：截至本次审阅，塞内加尔不实施欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度（即将固定清单的有害物质——铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE 及四项邻苯二甲酸酯——在电气电子设备均质材料中加以限制并作为市场准入条件）。未发现塞内加尔有相当于经（EU）2015/863 修订的欧盟指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）的、适用于 LED 灯具的对应制度。塞内加尔的有害物质控制（在其适用范围内）通过一般化学／环境及消费者保护规则以及任何适用的危险品进口管制处理，而非通过设有 0.1%/0.01% 最大浓度方案的产品级物质限制指令。制造商不应假定欧盟 RoHS 物质检测为塞内加尔法律要求；但许多买家及在地进口商仍可能按合同要求 RoHS 类声明。请与 ASN、贸易部及进口商确认任何适用的物质或化学品进口管制。
summary.zht: 明確而言：截至本次審閱，塞內加爾不實施歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度（即將固定清單的有害物質——鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE 及四項鄰苯二甲酸酯——在電氣電子設備均質材料中加以限制並作為市場准入條件）。未發現塞內加爾有相當於經（EU）2015/863 修訂的歐盟指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）的、適用於 LED 燈具的對應制度。塞內加爾的有害物質控制（在其適用範圍內）通過一般化學／環境及消費者保護規則以及任何適用的危險品進口管制處理，而非通過設有 0.1%/0.01% 最大濃度方案的產品級物質限制指令。製造商不應假定歐盟 RoHS 物質檢測為塞內加爾法律要求；但許多買家及在地進口商仍可能按合同要求 RoHS 類聲明。請與 ASN、貿易部及進口商確認任何適用的物質或化學品進口管制。

standards_or_laws: No Senegalese equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) / (EU) 2015/863 horizontal substance restriction identified for LED luminaires as of this review
General chemical/environmental and consumer-protection rules and hazardous-goods import controls (confirm applicable scope with ASN / Ministry of Trade / importer)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572-2011 （Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE）, covering the original 6 RoHS substances （Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE） at the same thresholds as EU RoHS, plus China RoHS 2 （Management Measures; SJ/T 11364-2014） which requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label （orange/green） on EEE sold in China. China RoHS focuses on disclosure labelling rather than restricting market access, and as of 2026 the four EU-added phthalates are not yet in the CN mandatory restricted list.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同，并配合中国 RoHS 2（管理办法；SJ/T 11364-2014）——要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色／绿色）。中国 RoHS 侧重披露标签而非限制市场准入，且截至 2026 年，欧盟新增的四项邻苯二甲酸酯尚未纳入中国强制限制清单。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同，並配合中國 RoHS 2（管理辦法；SJ/T 11364-2014）——要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色／綠色）。中國 RoHS 側重披露標籤而非限制市場准入，且截至 2026 年，歐盟新增的四項鄰苯二甲酸酯尚未納入中國強制限制清單。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: Honest mapping: there is no Senegalese horizontal RoHS to comply with, so unlike the China-to-EU case there is no EU-style substance-restriction gap （e.g., the four added phthalates） to close as a legal market-access condition for Senegal. The China RoHS disclosure label （SJ/T 11364） is a Chinese domestic requirement and is not required for Senegal either. Practical considerations remain: （1） buyers, brand owners, or the in-country importer may contractually require RoHS-type or substance declarations even though Senegal does not mandate them — many supply chains default to EU RoHS as a commercial baseline; （2） general hazardous-goods/chemical import controls and consumer-protection rules may still apply to specific substances — confirm with ASN/Ministry of Trade; （3） products already RoHS-compliant for other markets carry no disadvantage. Do not present EU RoHS testing as a Senegalese legal requirement; present it, where used, as a commercial/buyer expectation.
gap.zh: 诚实对应：塞内加尔无横向 RoHS 须遵守，故与中国至欧盟情形不同，不存在作为塞内加尔法律市场准入条件须弥补的欧盟式物质限制差距（如四项新增邻苯二甲酸酯）。中国 RoHS 披露标签（SJ/T 11364）为中国国内要求，塞内加尔亦不要求。实务考量仍在：（1）买家、品牌方或在地进口商可能按合同要求 RoHS 类或物质声明，即便塞内加尔不强制——许多供应链以欧盟 RoHS 作为商业基线；（2）一般危险品／化学品进口管制及消费者保护规则仍可能对特定物质适用——请与 ASN／贸易部确认；（3）已为其他市场符合 RoHS 的产品无不利影响。请勿将欧盟 RoHS 检测表述为塞内加尔法律要求；在采用时，应表述为商业／买家期望。
gap.zht: 誠實對應：塞內加爾無橫向 RoHS 須遵守，故與中國至歐盟情形不同，不存在作為塞內加爾法律市場准入條件須彌補的歐盟式物質限制差距（如四項新增鄰苯二甲酸酯）。中國 RoHS 披露標籤（SJ/T 11364）為中國國內要求，塞內加爾亦不要求。實務考量仍在：（1）買家、品牌方或在地進口商可能按合同要求 RoHS 類或物質聲明，即便塞內加爾不強制——許多供應鏈以歐盟 RoHS 作為商業基線；（2）一般危險品／化學品進口管制及消費者保護規則仍可能對特定物質適用——請與 ASN／貿易部確認；（3）已為其他市場符合 RoHS 的產品無不利影響。請勿將歐盟 RoHS 檢測表述為塞內加爾法律要求；在採用時，應表述為商業／買家期望。

mandatory_status.target: Not required (no horizontal RoHS) — no EU-style RoHS substance-restriction regime in Senegal as of this review; general chemical/hazardous-goods import controls may apply to specific substances (confirm scope)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: Ministry of Trade, Senegal / ASN — no horizontal RoHS regime identified for LED luminaires as of this review (scope to be confirmed)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Senegal has no EU-style horizontal RoHS substance-restriction regime for LED luminaires as of this review, so EU RoHS substance testing （including the four added phthalates） is not a Senegalese legal market-access requirement — do not present it as one. Buyers or the in-country importer may still request RoHS-type declarations as a commercial baseline, and general hazardous-goods/chemical import controls may apply to specific substances. China's RoHS disclosure label （SJ/T 11364） is a domestic requirement not needed for Senegal. Confirm any applicable substance or chemical-import controls with ASN, the Ministry of Trade, and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本次审阅，塞内加尔无欧盟式横向 RoHS 物质限制制度适用于 LED 灯具，故欧盟 RoHS 物质检测（含四项新增邻苯二甲酸酯）并非塞内加尔法律市场准入要求——请勿如此表述。买家或在地进口商仍可能按商业基线要求 RoHS 类声明，一般危险品／化学品进口管制可能对特定物质适用。中国 RoHS 披露标签（SJ/T 11364）为国内要求，塞内加尔无需。请与 ASN、贸易部及进口商确认任何适用的物质或化学品进口管制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本次審閱，塞內加爾無歐盟式橫向 RoHS 物質限制制度適用於 LED 燈具，故歐盟 RoHS 物質檢測（含四項新增鄰苯二甲酸酯）並非塞內加爾法律市場准入要求——請勿如此表述。買家或在地進口商仍可能按商業基線要求 RoHS 類聲明，一般危險品／化學品進口管制可能對特定物質適用。中國 RoHS 披露標籤（SJ/T 11364）為國內要求，塞內加爾無需。請與 ASN、貿易部及進口商確認任何適用的物質或化學品進口管制。

requirement_topic.en: Supply-Chain Chemical Notification — No REACH-Style SVHC Duty in Senegal
requirement_topic.zh: 供应链化学品通报——塞内加尔无 REACH 式 SVHC 义务
requirement_topic.zht: 供應鏈化學品通報——塞內加爾無 REACH 式 SVHC 義務

summary.en: Stated plainly: Senegal does not operate a REACH-style supply-chain notification regime equivalent to EU REACH Article 33 （duty to communicate the presence of Substances of Very High Concern above 0.1% w/w in articles） or an ECHA Candidate List / SCIP database obligation. No Senegalese equivalent to Regulation （EC） 1907/2006 （REACH） has been identified for LED luminaires as a market-access condition. To the extent chemicals are regulated in Senegal, it is through general chemical-management, environmental, and hazardous-substance import rules rather than an article-level SVHC communication duty tied to a biannually updated candidate list. Manufacturers should not assume a REACH-SVHC obligation applies in Senegal; however, EU-facing buyers in a multi-market supply chain may still request SVHC information. Confirm any applicable chemical-import or environmental controls with ASN, the relevant environment authority, and the importer.
summary.zh: 明确而言：塞内加尔不实施相当于欧盟 REACH 第 33 条（在物品中 SVHC 浓度超过 0.1% 质量分数时的通报义务）的 REACH 式供应链通报制度，亦无 ECHA 候选清单／SCIP 数据库义务。未发现塞内加尔有相当于法规（EC）1907/2006（REACH）的、作为 LED 灯具市场准入条件的对应制度。塞内加尔对化学品的监管（在其适用范围内）通过一般化学品管理、环境及危险物质进口规则处理，而非与每半年更新候选清单挂钩的物品级 SVHC 通报义务。制造商不应假定 REACH-SVHC 义务适用于塞内加尔；但多市场供应链中面向欧盟的买家仍可能要求 SVHC 信息。请与 ASN、相关环境主管部门及进口商确认任何适用的化学品进口或环境管制。
summary.zht: 明確而言：塞內加爾不實施相當於歐盟 REACH 第 33 條（在物品中 SVHC 濃度超過 0.1% 質量分數時的通報義務）的 REACH 式供應鏈通報制度，亦無 ECHA 候選清單／SCIP 數據庫義務。未發現塞內加爾有相當於法規（EC）1907/2006（REACH）的、作為 LED 燈具市場准入條件的對應制度。塞內加爾對化學品的監管（在其適用範圍內）通過一般化學品管理、環境及危險物質進口規則處理，而非與每半年更新候選清單掛鈎的物品級 SVHC 通報義務。製造商不應假定 REACH-SVHC 義務適用於塞內加爾；但多市場供應鏈中面向歐盟的買家仍可能要求 SVHC 信息。請與 ASN、相關環境主管部門及進口商確認任何適用的化學品進口或環境管制。

standards_or_laws: No Senegalese equivalent to Regulation (EC) 1907/2006 (REACH) Article 33 SVHC communication duty or ECHA Candidate List / SCIP obligation identified as of this review
General chemical-management / environmental / hazardous-substance import rules (confirm applicable scope with ASN / environment authority / importer)

summary.en: China also has no direct equivalent to REACH Article 33's article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty. The closest CN instruments are MEE Order No. 12 （2020, Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances） and GB 30981-2020 （Rules for classification and labelling of chemicals）, neither of which creates a duty to proactively notify B2B customers when an SVHC is present in an article above 0.1% w/w. So on this specific obligation, China and Senegal are similar to each other and both differ from the EU.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH 第 33 条物品级 SVHC 供应链通报义务的制度。最接近的中国工具为生态环境部令第 12 号（2020 年，《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》）及 GB 30981-2020（化学品分类和标签规则），二者均未产生在物品中 SVHC 浓度超过 0.1% 质量分数时主动通报 B2B 客户的义务。故就此特定义务，中国与塞内加尔彼此相似，且均不同于欧盟。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH 第 33 條物品級 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務的制度。最接近的中國工具為生態環境部令第 12 號（2020 年，《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》）及 GB 30981-2020（化學品分類和標籤規則），二者均未產生在物品中 SVHC 濃度超過 0.1% 質量分數時主動通報 B2B 客戶的義務。故就此特定義務，中國與塞內加爾彼此相似，且均不同於歐盟。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981-2020 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Honest mapping: because neither Senegal nor China imposes a REACH-style article-level SVHC notification duty, there is no EU-style supply-chain communication gap to close for the China-to-Senegal route — this is a point of alignment, not divergence. Practical notes: （1） an exporter selling into multiple markets （including the EU） may already maintain REACH-SVHC screening; that capability is reusable but not legally required for Senegal; （2） Senegal's general chemical/environmental import rules and any hazardous-substance controls may still touch specific substances — confirm scope with the relevant authority and importer; （3） do not represent ECHA Candidate List screening or SCIP registration as a Senegalese requirement. The compliance burden specific to Senegal on this element is effectively nil beyond general chemical-import compliance.
gap.zh: 诚实对应：由于塞内加尔与中国均不施加 REACH 式物品级 SVHC 通报义务，故中国至塞内加尔路径无需弥补欧盟式供应链通报差距——这是一致点而非分歧点。实务说明：（1）面向多市场（含欧盟）销售的出口商可能已维护 REACH-SVHC 筛查；该能力可复用，但对塞内加尔非法律要求；（2）塞内加尔一般化学品／环境进口规则及任何危险物质管制仍可能涉及特定物质——请与相关主管部门及进口商确认范围；（3）请勿将 ECHA 候选清单筛查或 SCIP 注册表述为塞内加尔要求。就此项而言，塞内加尔特有的合规负担在一般化学品进口合规之外实际上为零。
gap.zht: 誠實對應：由於塞內加爾與中國均不施加 REACH 式物品級 SVHC 通報義務，故中國至塞內加爾路徑無需彌補歐盟式供應鏈通報差距——這是一致點而非分歧點。實務說明：（1）面向多市場（含歐盟）銷售的出口商可能已維護 REACH-SVHC 篩查；該能力可復用，但對塞內加爾非法律要求；（2）塞內加爾一般化學品／環境進口規則及任何危險物質管制仍可能涉及特定物質——請與相關主管部門及進口商確認範圍；（3）請勿將 ECHA 候選清單篩查或 SCIP 註冊表述為塞內加爾要求。就此項而言，塞內加爾特有的合規負擔在一般化學品進口合規之外實際上為零。

mandatory_status.target: Not required — no REACH-style SVHC supply-chain notification or SCIP obligation in Senegal as of this review; general chemical/environmental import controls may apply to specific substances (confirm scope)
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — no article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty equivalent to REACH Article 33 exists in China as of 2026

source.publisher: Ministry of Trade, Senegal / ASN — no REACH-style SVHC regime identified for LED luminaires as of this review (scope to be confirmed)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Senegal has no REACH-style article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty, ECHA Candidate List screening obligation, or SCIP registration requirement for LED luminaires as of this review — and neither does China, so this is a point of alignment rather than a China-to-Senegal gap. Do not present REACH-SVHC screening as a Senegalese legal requirement. EU-facing buyers in a multi-market supply chain may still request SVHC information, and general chemical/environmental import controls may apply to specific substances. Confirm any applicable controls with ASN, the relevant environment authority, and the importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本次审阅，塞内加尔无 REACH 式物品级 SVHC 供应链通报义务、ECHA 候选清单筛查义务或 SCIP 注册要求适用于 LED 灯具——中国亦无，故此为一致点而非中国至塞内加尔的差距。请勿将 REACH-SVHC 筛查表述为塞内加尔法律要求。多市场供应链中面向欧盟的买家仍可能要求 SVHC 信息，一般化学品／环境进口管制可能对特定物质适用。请与 ASN、相关环境主管部门及进口商确认任何适用管制。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本次審閱，塞內加爾無 REACH 式物品級 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務、ECHA 候選清單篩查義務或 SCIP 註冊要求適用於 LED 燈具——中國亦無，故此為一致點而非中國至塞內加爾的差距。請勿將 REACH-SVHC 篩查表述為塞內加爾法律要求。多市場供應鏈中面向歐盟的買家仍可能要求 SVHC 信息，一般化學品／環境進口管制可能對特定物質適用。請與 ASN、相關環境主管部門及進口商確認任何適用管制。

requirement_topic.en: Overall Conformity Process and Documentation — Ministry of Trade PEC/VoC vs CCC
requirement_topic.zh: 整体符合性流程与文件——贸易部 PEC/VoC 对比 CCC
requirement_topic.zht: 整體符合性流程與文件——貿易部 PEC/VoC 對比 CCC

summary.en: Market entry into Senegal for LED luminaires generally runs through the Ministry of Trade conformity / pre-export verification of conformity （PEC/VoC） process for regulated imports, rather than the EU CE self-declaration model or China's domestic CCC. Typical elements: （1） demonstrate conformity against the adopted NS/IEC standards （NS/IEC 60598-1 luminaires, IEC 62560 lamps, IEC 62471 photobiological, CISPR 15 emissions） via test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; （2） obtain a Certificate of Conformity / verification under the applicable conformity programme where the product is regulated; （3） provide French-language documentation （instructions, safety information, declarations）; （4） clear customs through an in-country importer of record, typically via the port of Dakar; （5） for smart/wireless luminaires, obtain ARTP radio approval separately （see ledsn-emc-02）. The product must be rated and marked for 230 V, 50 Hz. Confirm the current regulated-product list, conformity-assessment body, and required certificates with ASN, the Ministry of Trade, and the importer.
summary.zh: LED 灯具进入塞内加尔市场通常对受管制进口经贸易部符合性／出口前符合性验证（PEC/VoC）流程办理，而非欧盟 CE 自我声明模式或中国国内 CCC。典型要素：（1）通过 ILAC 认可实验室的检测报告，对照所采用的 NS/IEC 标准（灯具 NS/IEC 60598-1、灯 IEC 62560、光生物 IEC 62471、发射 CISPR 15）证明符合性；（2）在产品受管制时按适用符合性计划取得符合性证书／验证；（3）提供法语文件（说明、安全信息、声明）；（4）经在地进口记录人清关，通常经达喀尔港；（5）智能／无线灯具须另行取得 ARTP 无线电核准（见 ledsn-emc-02）。产品须按 230 V、50 Hz 额定和标识。请与 ASN、贸易部及进口商确认现行受管制产品清单、合格评定机构及所需证书。
summary.zht: LED 燈具進入塞內加爾市場通常對受管制進口經貿易部符合性／出口前符合性驗證（PEC/VoC）流程辦理，而非歐盟 CE 自我聲明模式或中國國內 CCC。典型要素：（1）通過 ILAC 認可實驗室的檢測報告，對照所採用的 NS/IEC 標準（燈具 NS/IEC 60598-1、燈 IEC 62560、光生物 IEC 62471、發射 CISPR 15）證明符合性；（2）在產品受管制時按適用符合性計劃取得符合性證書／驗證；（3）提供法語文件（說明、安全信息、聲明）；（4）經在地進口記錄人清關，通常經達喀爾港；（5）智能／無線燈具須另行取得 ARTP 無線電核准（見 ledsn-emc-02）。產品須按 230 V、50 Hz 額定和標識。請與 ASN、貿易部及進口商確認現行受管制產品清單、合格評定機構及所需證書。

standards_or_laws: Ministry of Trade conformity / pre-export verification of conformity (PEC/VoC) programme for regulated imports (Senegal)
NS/IEC 60598-1, IEC 62560, IEC 62471, CISPR 15 as adopted by ASN; ARTP radio approval for wireless luminaires; French-language documentation; in-country importer

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for in-scope residential luminaires is CCC （China Compulsory Certification）, administered by CNCA, requiring third-party certification by a CNCA-authorized body （e.g., CQC）, with testing at CNCA-authorized laboratories. For wireless-enabled luminaires, SRRC type approval is additionally required domestically. CCC and CQC certificates are issued in the Chinese system and are not recognised by Senegal's conformity verification — the Senegalese PEC/VoC route is a separate, non-mutual process.
summary.zh: 在中国，范围内居民灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，须由 CNCA 授权机构（如 CQC）进行第三方认证，并由 CNCA 授权实验室检测。对于无线灯具，国内还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 及 CQC 证书在中国体系内签发，不被塞内加尔符合性验证认可——塞内加尔 PEC/VoC 路径为独立的非互认流程。
summary.zht: 在中國，範圍內居民燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，須由 CNCA 授權機構（如 CQC）進行第三方認證，並由 CNCA 授權實驗室檢測。對於無線燈具，國內還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 及 CQC 證書在中國體系內簽發，不被塞內加爾符合性驗證認可——塞內加爾 PEC/VoC 路徑為獨立的非互認流程。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: The processes are parallel and non-mutual: a Chinese CCC certificate does not clear Senegalese conformity, and Senegal's PEC/VoC verification is a separate submission. Key differences from the China-to-EU case: （1） there is no EU-style single CE self-declaration with a 10-year technical-file retention rule and EU Authorised Representative — instead an in-country importer of record handles entry through Dakar; （2） conformity is verified against NS/IEC adoptions through a Ministry-of-Trade-driven programme （PEC/VoC）, which may involve a designated conformity-assessment body issuing a Certificate of Conformity; （3） all documentation must be in French rather than an EU official language; （4） test reports should be from an ILAC-recognised laboratory accepted in the programme — Chinese CCC reports are not automatically accepted; （5） smart luminaires need ARTP approval （no EU-RED equivalent applies, but a national radio homologation does）. The exact regulated-product list, conformity body, certificate type, and whether a given LED luminaire is in scope must all be confirmed with ASN, the Ministry of Trade, and the importer before shipment.
gap.zh: 两套流程并行且不互认：中国 CCC 证书不能通过塞内加尔符合性，塞内加尔 PEC/VoC 验证为单独提交。与中国至欧盟情形的主要差异：（1）无欧盟式单一 CE 自我声明及 10 年技术文件保存规则和欧盟授权代表——而是由在地进口记录人经达喀尔办理入境；（2）符合性通过贸易部主导的计划（PEC/VoC）对照 NS/IEC 采用标准验证，可能涉及指定合格评定机构签发符合性证书；（3）所有文件须为法语而非欧盟官方语言；（4）检测报告宜来自计划接受的 ILAC 认可实验室——中国 CCC 报告不自动被接受；（5）智能灯具须 ARTP 核准（无欧盟 RED 等效适用，但有国家无线电认证）。确切的受管制产品清单、合格评定机构、证书类型及某 LED 灯具是否在范围内，均须在出货前与 ASN、贸易部及进口商确认。
gap.zht: 兩套流程並行且不互認：中國 CCC 證書不能通過塞內加爾符合性，塞內加爾 PEC/VoC 驗證為單獨提交。與中國至歐盟情形的主要差異：（1）無歐盟式單一 CE 自我聲明及 10 年技術文件保存規則和歐盟授權代表——而是由在地進口記錄人經達喀爾辦理入境；（2）符合性通過貿易部主導的計劃（PEC/VoC）對照 NS/IEC 採用標準驗證，可能涉及指定合格評定機構簽發符合性證書；（3）所有文件須為法語而非歐盟官方語言；（4）檢測報告宜來自計劃接受的 ILAC 認可實驗室——中國 CCC 報告不自動被接受；（5）智能燈具須 ARTP 核准（無歐盟 RED 等效適用，但有國家無線電認證）。確切的受管制產品清單、合格評定機構、證書類型及某 LED 燈具是否在範圍內，均須在出貨前與 ASN、貿易部及進口商確認。

mandatory_status.target: Conformity-verification dependent — Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC for regulated imports; in-country importer and French documentation required; ARTP approval for wireless luminaires (confirm regulated-product scope with ASN)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC required for in-scope residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: Ministry of Trade, Senegal / ASN — conformity (PEC/VoC) programme scope and designated body to be confirmed

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaire entry into Senegal generally runs through the Ministry of Trade conformity / PEC/VoC route for regulated imports, against NS/IEC adoptions （60598-1, 62560, 62471, CISPR 15）, with ILAC-recognised test reports, French documentation, and an in-country importer through Dakar — not the EU CE self-declaration model or Chinese CCC. CCC and PEC/VoC are parallel, non-mutual processes. Smart luminaires additionally need ARTP radio approval. Confirm the current regulated-product list, conformity-assessment body, certificate type, and whether the specific product is in scope with ASN, the Ministry of Trade, and the importer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] LED 灯具进入塞内加尔通常对受管制进口经贸易部符合性／PEC/VoC 路径办理，对照 NS/IEC 采用标准（60598-1、62560、62471、CISPR 15），须 ILAC 认可检测报告、法语文件及经达喀尔的在地进口商——而非欧盟 CE 自我声明模式或中国 CCC。CCC 与 PEC/VoC 为并行的非互认流程。智能灯具还须 ARTP 无线电核准。请在出货前与 ASN、贸易部及进口商确认现行受管制产品清单、合格评定机构、证书类型及特定产品是否在范围内。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] LED 燈具進入塞內加爾通常對受管制進口經貿易部符合性／PEC/VoC 路徑辦理，對照 NS/IEC 採用標準（60598-1、62560、62471、CISPR 15），須 ILAC 認可檢測報告、法語文件及經達喀爾的在地進口商——而非歐盟 CE 自我聲明模式或中國 CCC。CCC 與 PEC/VoC 為並行的非互認流程。智能燈具還須 ARTP 無線電核准。請在出貨前與 ASN、貿易部及進口商確認現行受管制產品清單、合格評定機構、證書類型及特定產品是否在範圍內。
